name: Undying Thunder
descriptionTemplate: Draw [Arg2] {plural:[Arg2]|card|cards}. Gain [Arg1] Shield. If Corposant is in your team, create 1 {Pilot}.
lore:
Burn, burn, burn.
Even if my bones and blood are boiling, even if my flesh is charred, I will squeeze out the last drop of blood in my body to shine bright.
Because in this darkness, I am the only guide.
